prose.en: Document and monitor information security and privacy training activities, including security and privacy awareness training and specific role-based security and privacy training; and

guidance.en: Documentation for specialized training may be maintained by individual supervisors at the discretion of the organization. The National Archives and Records Administration provides guidance on records retention for federal agencies.

prose.en: information security and privacy training activities, including security and privacy awareness training and specific role-based security and privacy training, are documented;
information security and privacy training activities, including security and privacy awareness training and specific role-based security and privacy training, are monitored;
individual training records are retained for {param:at-04_odp}.
